name: prd-evaluate-idea
description: Evaluate a product idea — simulates PRD pipeline agent call
prompt:
Evaluate this product idea for a SaaS platform:

Idea: AI-powered meeting summarizer that integrates with Zoom and Google Meet. It records, transcribes, and generates structured summaries with action items, decisions, and follow-ups.

Score this idea 1-10 on: market demand, technical feasibility, competitive landscape, revenue potential, and implementation effort. Provide a brief rationale for each score and an overall recommendation.
success_criteria: Structured evaluation with scores and rationale
